September 4, 2024 
Grant Funding Profiles 
Key points 
The CDC Grant Funding Profiles site has state-and-territory-specific grants funding profiles starting with fiscal year 2010. 
CDC Grant Funding Profiles site 
The CDC Grant Funding Profiles site offers quick access to information on CDC funding provided to recipients in states and territories to address issues of public health importance. This includes funding provided to state and loca
